banner.unverified: Please verify your email address ({email}) to secure your account.

auth.signInSubtitle: Sign in to access your personalised features
auth.signUpSubtitle: Join Sustainability Atlas to monitor carbon markets
auth.passwordHint: Password must be at least 12 characters.
auth.forgotSubtitle: Enter your email and we'll send you a reset link
auth.errorGeneric: Something went wrong. Please try again.
auth.emailInvalid: Enter a valid email address (e.g. name{'@'}example.com).
auth.passwordWeak: Password does not meet the requirements below.

forcePassword.title: Set a new password
forcePassword.subtitle: Your account requires a password change before you continue.

verify.failedHelp: This link is single-use and expires in 24 hours — it may already be used or expired. Sign in and use the “Resend verification” option in the banner to get a fresh link.

reset.title: Set a new password
reset.subtitle: Choose a new password for your account.
reset.missingToken: This reset link is missing its token.
reset.doneSubtitle: Your password has been updated. Please sign in with your new password.

userMgmt.title: User Management
userMgmt.subtitle: Manage users, roles and access
userMgmt.createSubtitle: Add a new Registered user or administrator
userMgmt.passwordNote: The user will be asked to change it on first login.

validation.passwordTooShort: Password must be at least 12 characters.

quota.title: Adjust rate limit
quota.subtitle: Set the per-hour API request limit for {email}.

rateLimit.title: API Rate Limit
rateLimit.justificationPlaceholder: Explain why you need a higher limit…
rateLimit.justificationShort: Please provide a justification (at least 10 characters).
rateLimit.adminNote: You hold the administrator quota and review other users' increase requests.
rateLimit.noRequests: No rate limit requests. All user requests will appear here for your review.
rateLimit.adjustHint: The new quota applies immediately to the user's keys. It may be lower than requested.

apiKeys.intro: Manage programmatic access keys for data integrations. Keys are shown in full only once when created — store them securely.
apiKeys.limitReached: You've reached the maximum of 3 active keys. Revoke an existing key before generating a new one.
apiKeys.createdOnce: Copy it now — this is the only time you'll see the full key.
apiKeys.nameRequired: Please enter a name for the key.
apiKeys.empty: No API keys yet. Generate one to start consuming platform data programmatically.

account.title: Account Settings
account.subtitle: Manage your profile, security and API access
account.apiKeysComingSoon: Programmatic API key management will be available here soon.
account.signOutHint: You'll need to sign in again to access personalised features.
account.securityHint: Change the password you use to sign in.
account.emailImmutable: Your email address can't be changed.

feedback.title: Send us feedback
feedback.placeholder: Tell us what's working, what's broken, or what you'd like to see...
feedback.emailHint: We'll only use it to notify you when this is resolved.
feedback.emailInvalid: Please enter a valid email address.
feedback.error: Failed to send feedback. Please try again.

dashboard.title: Dashboard
dashboard.subtitle: Overview of the Hedera Guardian sustainability network
dashboard.filterTooltip: Filter all dashboard data by project developer and/or registry. All cards, charts, map, and tables update to show only matching projects.

stats.registriesTooltip: Number of unique Standard Registries with data (Methodologies, projects, users, or issuances) matching the current filters. The change indicator shows how many new registries joined compared to the previous year.
stats.methodologiesTooltip: Total number of unique published policy methodologies across all matching registries. The change indicator shows how many new methodologies were published compared to the previous year.
stats.projectsTooltip: Count of sustainability projects registered and verified on the Guardian network matching the current filters. The change indicator shows the net increase in projects compared to the previous year.
stats.totalIssuancesTooltip: Sum of all issuances on-chain across matching projects. The change indicator shows the percentage growth in total issuances compared to the previous year.
stats.totalRetiredTooltip: Sum of all issuances permanently retired (burned) for offsetting purposes across matching projects.

dashboard.projectDistributionTooltip: Countries are colored by project count. Darker green = more projects. Click a country to see detailed breakdown. Small dots show individual project locations.
dashboard.noCountries: No countries match the selected filters
dashboard.sectorRegistryBreakdownTooltip: Distribution of projects and issuances by sector and registry. Toggle between project count and issuance volume. Reflects current developer/registry filters.
dashboard.sectorRegistryBreakdownSub: Distribution of projects and issuances by sector and registry
dashboard.topRegistriesTooltip: Ranked by project count. Policies = unique methodologies published. Issuances = total issued on-chain by this registry.
dashboard.topRegistriesSub: Most active by policy and project count
dashboard.name: Name
dashboard.noRegistries: No registries match the selected filters
dashboard.issuanceTrendTooltip: Issuance volume over time derived from project creation dates.
dashboard.noIssuanceData: No issuance data matches the selected filters
dashboard.retirementTrendTooltip: Retirement volume over time. Shows issuances permanently retired (burned) for offsetting.
dashboard.noRetirementData: No retirement data matches the selected filters
dashboard.vintageDistributionTooltip: Distribution of issuances by vintage year. Shows which years have the most credits issued across matching projects.
dashboard.noVintageData: No vintage data matches the selected filters
dashboard.networkActivityTooltip: Recent events on the Guardian network including new project registrations, credit issuances, policy publications, and verifications.
dashboard.networkActivitySub: Recent changes across the Guardian network
dashboard.noActivity: No recent activity matches the selected filters

projects.title: Projects
projects.subtitle: Verified sustainability projects on the Guardian network
projects.sdgsTooltip: UN Sustainable Development Goals this project contributes to. Hover over each icon for the full goal name.
projects.sectorTooltip: Includes Sectoral Scope as additional detail
projects.stageTooltip: Where the project sits in the credit lifecycle: Registered → Validated → MRV Submitted → Verified → Issued.
projects.expectedIssuanceYearTooltip: The year credits are first expected to be issued — applies to pre-issuance projects. Shows "TBD" when no forecast is available yet, and "—" for projects that have already issued.

milestones.title: Milestone Tracker
milestones.subtitle: Registration → Validation → MRV Submission → Verification → Issuance

linkedVcs.title: Linked Raw Data
linkedVcs.subtitle: Raw data documents that contributed to this project, grouped by schema. Empty schemas indicate fields that couldn't be extracted.
linkedVcs.empty: No raw data linked from this schema
linkedVcs.notTracked: No linked raw data available — re-parse the methodology to populate.

actions.reextractSuccess: Re-extracting from {count} VC(s) — refresh in a few seconds
actions.reextractEmpty: Nothing to re-extract — no linked VCs on this project yet
actions.refreshIpfsTooltip: Force re-fetch IPFS for every VC in this project's topic and reparse. Use when fields are missing because part of the VC chain never came down from IPFS.
actions.refreshIpfsSuccess: Queued {refreshed} IPFS fetch(es) and {reparse} reparse(s) — refresh in a few seconds
actions.refreshIpfsEmpty: Nothing to refresh — all VCs in this project's topic are already fetched and indexed

compare.title: Compare Projects
compare.subtitle: Side-by-side comparison of up to 4 projects
compare.needTwo: Select at least 2 projects to compare.

credits.title: Issuances
credits.subtitle: Tokens issued on Hedera
credits.supplyTooltip: Total number of Credits Minted for the particular project. For NFTs, this is the number of unique serials.

filters.hideUnlinked: Hide issuances with no project link

tooltips.hideUnlinked: Hides tokens that have not yet been matched to a project. Uncheck to see all indexed tokens including those still awaiting project attribution.
tooltips.mintAmount: Total number of Credits Minted for the particular project. For NFTs, this is the number of unique serials.

detail.supplyDifferenceTooltip: The Supply Amount and Minted Amount for this issuance are currently different.
detail.tokenSupplyTooltip: Total number of tokens that are currently in circulation.
detail.totalMintedAllTooltip: Total number of tokens minted across all projects to this token.
detail.totalMintedProjectTooltip: Total number of tokens minted specifically to this project.
detail.relatedIssuancesSubtitle: Other issuances for this token ID
detail.noRelatedIssuances: No issuances found for this token ID.
detail.mintEventsSubtitle: Guardian VC transaction records attributed to this project.
detail.mintEventsSubtitleAll: Guardian VC transaction records for this token across all projects.
detail.noMintEvents: No mint events found for this issuance.
detail.registrySubtitle: Retrieved via token → project → methodology chain

savedSearch.dialogSubtitle: Save your current filters to reapply them later
savedSearch.duplicateName: A saved search with this name already exists
savedSearch.duplicateCriteria: This exact set of filters is already saved as "{name}"
savedSearch.saveError: Could not save search — please try again
savedSearch.limitReachedTooltip: You've reached the maximum of {max} saved searches

methodologies.title: Methodologies
methodologies.subtitle: Published policy workflows for sustainability verification

decoded.title: Decoded Mapping
decoded.noSchema: No project schema confirmed yet. The decoder hasn't found a schema with both a GeoJSON field and a name field.
decoded.noGeoBody: None of the imported schemas had enough matching fields to be classified as a project registration schema. The schemas were imported but no fields could be reliably mapped to project attributes.

actions.title: Mapping actions
actions.rerunSuccess: Decoder re-queued — refresh in a few seconds
actions.reparseEmpty: Nothing to re-parse — decode first or no cached VCs
actions.reparseDisabledHint: Decode the policy successfully before re-parsing projects

linkedProjects.title: Linked Projects
linkedProjects.noTopicId: No policy topic ID available for this methodology.
linkedProjects.noProjects: No projects found under this policy.

policy.title: On-Chain Policy
policy.governedBy: This methodology is governed by an on-chain Guardian policy.
policy.downloadPending: Preparing download… (fetching from IPFS may take a moment)
policy.downloadNotReady: The policy package isn't ready yet — the policy hasn't been fully decoded. Please try again later.
policy.downloadError: Couldn't download the policy package. Please try again.
policy.downloadAuthRequired: Please sign in to download the policy package.
policy.downloadRateLimited: You've hit the download rate limit. Please wait a moment and try again.

actions.compareVersionsDesc: Select another version to compare side-by-side against this one.
actions.noOtherVersions: No other versions available for this methodology.

registries.subtitle: Standard Registries operating on the Guardian network

filters.name: Name
filters.hideEmpty: Hide registries with no methodologies, projects, users, or issuances

tooltips.hideEmpty: On by default. Hides registries with 0 methodologies, 0 projects, 0 users, and 0 issuances — the same set counted in the dashboard 'Registries' stat card. Uncheck to see every indexed registry, including announcement-only ones with no on-chain activity yet.

detail.notFoundDesc: The registry with ID {id} could not be found on {network}.

map.subtitle: Geographic distribution of projects in this registry

topMethodologies.title: Top Methodologies

developers.subtitle: Organizations developing and managing carbon offset projects
developers.issuedTooltip: Total issuances across all projects by this developer.
developers.retiredTooltip: Issuances permanently retired (used for offsetting). Retired issuances cannot be traded or reused.

sdgs.title: Sustainable Development Goals
sdgs.subtitle: Project contributions mapped to the UN SDGs
sdgs.coverageTooltip: Percentage of total projects that contribute to this SDG. A project can contribute to multiple SDGs.

watchlist.subtitle: Add or remove projects to track

chartBuilder.title: Add Custom Chart
chartBuilder.subtitle: {used}/{max} custom charts used — choose type and data source
chartBuilder.editSubtitle: Update the chart type, data source, or title
chartBuilder.note: Charts reflect your active watchlist. Up to {max} custom charts total.
chartBuilder.duplicateName: A chart with this name already exists.
chartBuilder.duplicateConfig: You already have a chart with this configuration: "{name}" ({config}).

reports.title: Reports & Export
reports.subtitle: Export ESG datasets, generate impact summaries, and access disclosure guidance

placeholders.exportData: Export configuration and field selection are coming soon.
placeholders.impactSummary: The Impact Summary generator is coming soon.
placeholders.disclosureGuidance: Disclosure guidance and framework references are coming soon.

config.title: Configure Summary
config.subtitle: Choose an output format and generate a compiled impact summary.

preview.title: Portfolio Impact Overview
preview.empty: No impact data is available for this network yet.

disclosure.frameworksSubtitle: Exports and summaries align with widely used disclosure and accounting frameworks.

ghgProtocol.name: GHG Protocol
ghgProtocol.desc: Corporate accounting and reporting standard for greenhouse gas emissions.

cdp.name: CDP
cdp.desc: Global environmental disclosure system for climate, water and forests.

gri.name: GRI
gri.desc: Global Reporting Initiative sustainability reporting standards.

iso14064.name: ISO 14064
iso14064.desc: Standard for quantification and reporting of GHG emissions and removals.

emissionsReduced.title: Emissions Reduced
emissionsReduced.body: The quantity of greenhouse gas emissions avoided or removed, expressed in tonnes of CO₂ equivalent (tCO₂e), as reported by the issuing project.
emissionsReduced.formula: emissions_reduced (tCO₂e) = Σ verified emission reductions per issuance

vintageYear.title: Vintage Year
vintageYear.body: The calendar year in which the underlying emission reduction or removal activity occurred. For credits, the reporting year is the calendar year of the on-chain minting activity.

mitigationType.title: Mitigation Type
mitigationType.body: The class of climate action (e.g. avoidance or removal) derived from the methodology's emission-reduction approach.

howToVerify.title: How to Verify
howToVerify.body: Every exported record includes traceability references. Use the verification URL to open the corresponding transaction, token or topic on the Hedera network explorer (HashScan) for independent confirmation.

preApprovedSources.title: Pre-approved Import Sources
preApprovedSources.body: External data may only be imported from pre-approved sources that support automated verification. Records from sources without a verification mechanism are not admitted.

verificationStatus.title: Verification Status
verificationStatus.body: All records are anchored on the Hedera network and independently verifiable on-chain.

assurance.title: Assurance & Independent Verification
assurance.body: Figures are compiled from on-chain data and issuer disclosures. Retirement figures are inferred from token-deletion activity, not a dedicated retirement ledger, and should be treated accordingly.
assurance.blockItemProof: Block Item Proofs for independent cryptographic validation of distributed-ledger records are planned for Q3 2026.

transactionId.label: Transaction ID
transactionId.tooltip: Used to verify the credit on HashScan blockchain explorer

registryRecordId.label: Registry Record ID
registryRecordId.tooltip: Links directly to the record on the issuing registry

verificationUrl.label: Verification URL
verificationUrl.tooltip: Redirects to HashScan or registry for independent validation

sourceSystemId.label: Source System ID
sourceSystemId.tooltip: Identifier in the originating system outside Guardian

ipfsDocumentRef.label: IPFS Document Reference
ipfsDocumentRef.description: Content identifier (CID) of a linked IPFS document
ipfsDocumentRef.tooltip: Resolves via any public IPFS gateway (e.g. ipfs.io/ipfs/{cid})

preview.title: Export Preview
preview.noFieldsSelected: Select at least one field to export.

glossary.emissionsReduced: tCO₂e sequestered or avoided by the project.
glossary.reportingYear: Calendar year the underlying activity or credit generation occurred.
glossary.mitigationType: Whether the credit represents emissions avoidance, removal, or reduction.
glossary.standard: The governing standard or methodology applied to the credit.
glossary.vintage: The year the credit was generated.
glossary.transactionId: Hedera on-chain transaction reference — used to verify the credit on HashScan blockchain explorer.
glossary.registryRecordId: Source registry identifier — links directly to the record on the issuing registry.
glossary.verificationUrl: Direct link to independent verification — redirects to HashScan or the registry for independent validation.
glossary.sourceSystemId: Identifier in the originating system outside Guardian.
